chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. S – 57 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.158/2022 (Ex./A) 2. For orders on CMA No.159/2022 (Stay) 3. For hearing of main case 06.11.2023 None present. No intimation is received. It appears that since filing of this petition on 12.03.22, none has pursued the same. Accordingly, the petition is dismissed in non-prosecution along with listed applications. J U D G E Abdul Basit
